variants.label: Production baseline
variants.notes: Baseline. Major issues: extra ## 系统状态 section (10/20), template echo (9/20), hallucinated entity-name anchors (18/20).

variants.label: Explicit section constraint + no-copy instruction
variants.changes_from_previous: Added explicit 'no extra sections' rule. Removed template-sounding instructions. Added '禁止' language for anchor misuse.
variants.notes: Fixed extra sections and template echo completely. Hallucinated anchors still major issue (14/20).

variants.label: Clarified anchor definition
variants.changes_from_previous: Explicitly stated what IS and IS NOT a structural marker. Removed the term '锚点' in favor of '结构性标记'. Added negative examples.
variants.notes: Reduced hallucinated anchors from 14 to 9. Missing anchors increased to 3.

variants.label: Renamed anchor concept + example format
variants.changes_from_previous: Completely avoided '锚点' term. Used '当前位置：第七十八回' example format instead. More concise prompt.
variants.notes: WINNER. 87.5% issue reduction. Remaining 3 hallucinated anchors all from data contamination (memory cache input already has 锚点). 2 missing anchors from window boundary effects.
